flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northeast Wisconsin Technical College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (7.1k → 5.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeast Wisconsin Technical College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (43.9% → 38.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northeast Wisconsin Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
